div1.entryFree:
Precept, 1) précept, instruction, lesson: what are --s worth of stale example? Compl. 267. my father's --s I therein forget, Tp. III, 1, 58. in action all of p. Meas. IV, 1, 40. I will bestow some --s of this virgin, All's III, 5, 103. to load me with --s, Cor. IV, 1, 10. never learned the icy --s of respect, Tim. IV, 3, 258. these few --s, Hml. I, 3, 58. then I --s gave her, II, 2, 142 (Qq prescripts).
2) precépt, mandate, summons: those --s cannot be served, H4B V, 1, 14. send --s to the leviathan to come ashore, H5 III, 3, 26.
